mapper.sql:
WITH themeInCourse AS ( SELECT t.id AS id, t.name AS name FROM theme t WHERE t.cid = #{c_id,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} ), main_q AS ( SELECT q.id AS main_id, q.answerid AS answerid, q.atid AS atid, q.cid AS cid, q.qtiscon AS qtiscon, q.mqid AS mqid, q.ismain AS ismain, q.state AS state, q.content AS content, q.distinction AS distinction, q.standard_deviation AS standard_deviation, q.realdifficulty AS realdifficulty, q.num AS num, q.addtime AS addtime, q.count AS count, q.verifyid AS verifyid, q.creatorid AS creatorid, q.verifyname AS verifyname, q.lastverifyname AS lastverifyname, q.creatorname AS creatorname, q.qtid AS qtid, q.sourceid AS sourceid, q.answertime_bachelor AS answertime_bachelor, q.answertime AS answertime, q.theme1id AS theme1id, q.theme2id AS theme2id, q.theme3id AS theme3id, q.cognitionid_bachelor AS cognitionid_bachelor, q.difficultyid_bachelor AS difficultyid_bachelor, q.knowledgeid_bachelor AS knowledgeid_bachelor, q.testtime AS testtime, q.verify_suggestion as verify_suggestion FROM question_db q WHERE q.cid = #{c_id,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AND ( (NVL(q.qtiscon,0) = 1 AND NVL(q.ismain,0) = 1) OR NVL(q.qtiscon,0) = 0 )
and q.state = #{state}
AND q.state != 2
AND q.theme1id = #{th1id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND q.theme2id = #{th2id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND q.theme3id = #{th3id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND q.qtid = #{qtid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND q.cognitionid_bachelor = #{coid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND q.difficultyid_bachelor = #{did,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND q.knowledgeid_bachelor = #{kid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND (floor(sysdate - to_date(q.testtime)) >= #{forbidDay} OR q.testtime IS NULL)
AND q.num >= #{testNumMin,jdbcType=INTEGER}
AND q.num <= #{testNumMax,jdbcType=INTEGER}
AND q.num < #{forbidNum}
AND dbms_lob.instr(q.content, #{question,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, 1) > 0
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM answer_db ad WHERE ad.qid = q.id AND ( (ad.atid IN (N'5',N'6',N'7',N'10',N'11',N'12',N'13') AND dbms_lob.instr(ad.content_6, #{answer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, 1) > 0) OR (ad.atid IN (N'0',N'1',N'2',N'3',N'4',N'8',N'9') AND instr(ad.content, #{answer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) > 0) ) )
AND q.id IN
#{item,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}
AND 1 = 0
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM teacher tt WHERE tt.id = q.creatorid AND tt.real_name LIKE '%' || #{teacher,jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%' )
AND to_date(#{begindate}, 'yyyy-MM-dd') <= trunc(q.addtime) AND to_date(#{enddate}, 'yyyy-MM-dd') >= trunc(q.addtime)
), picked_q AS ( SELECT q.*, m.main_id AS main_id FROM question_db q JOIN main_q m ON q.id = m.main_id WHERE q.cid = #{c_id,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}
UNION ALL
SELECT q.*, m.main_id AS main_id FROM question_db q JOIN main_q m ON q.mqid = m.main_id WHERE q.cid = #{c_id,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AND q.qtiscon = 1 AND q.ismain = 0 ) SELECT q.id AS qid, q.answerid AS answerid, q.atid AS atid, q.cid AS cid, q.qtiscon AS qtiscon, q.mqid AS mqid, q.ismain AS ismain, q.state AS state, q.content AS content, q.distinction AS distinction, q.standard_deviation AS standardDeviation, q.realdifficulty AS realdifficulty, q.num AS num, q.addtime AS addtime, q.count AS count, v.real_name AS verify_teacher, t.real_name AS creator, q.verifyname AS verifyname, q.lastverifyname AS lastverifyname, q.creatorname AS creatorname, qt.qtname AS qtname, s.name AS soname, c.coname AS coname, d.name AS dname, k.name AS kname, q.answertime_bachelor AS time, q.answertime AS answertime, t1.name AS t1name, t2.name AS t2name, t3.name AS t3name FROM picked_q q JOIN main_q m ON q.main_id = m.main_id LEFT JOIN themeInCourse t1 ON q.theme1id = t1.id LEFT JOIN themeInCourse t2 ON q.theme2id = t2.id LEFT JOIN themeInCourse t3 ON q.theme3id = t3.id LEFT JOIN course_cognition c ON c.coid = q.cognitionid_bachelor AND c.cid = q.cid LEFT JOIN difficulty d ON d.id = q.difficultyid_bachelor LEFT JOIN knowledge k ON k.id = q.knowledgeid_bachelor LEFT JOIN course_questiontype qt ON qt.qtid = q.qtid AND qt.cid = q.cid LEFT JOIN source s ON s.id = q.sourceid LEFT JOIN teacher t ON q.creatorid = t.id LEFT JOIN teacher v ON q.verifyid = v.id
ORDER BY m.addtime DESC, m.main_id DESC
ORDER BY NLSSORT(dbms_lob.substr(m.content, 100), 'NLS_SORT = SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') DESC, m.main_id DESC
ORDER BY qt.qtname DESC, m.main_id DESC
ORDER BY c.coname DESC, m.main_id DESC
ORDER BY d.name DESC, m.main_id DESC
ORDER BY m.answertime_bachelor DESC, m.main_id DESC
ORDER BY m.num DESC, m.main_id DESC
ORDER BY m.realdifficulty DESC, m.main_id DESC
ORDER BY m.distinction DESC, m.main_id DESC
ORDER BY m.distinction DESC, m.main_id DESC
ORDER BY t.real_name DESC, m.main_id DESC
ORDER BY v.real_name DESC, m.main_id DESC
ORDER BY t1.name DESC, t2.name DESC, t3.name DESC, m.main_id DESC
ORDER BY m.creatorname DESC, m.main_id DESC
ORDER BY m.addtime DESC, m.main_id DESC
ORDER BY m.addtime DESC, m.main_id DESC
ORDER BY NLSSORT(dbms_lob.substr(m.content, 100), 'NLS_SORT = SCHINESE_PINYIN_M') ASC, m.main_id ASC
ORDER BY qt.qtname ASC, m.main_id ASC
ORDER BY c.coname ASC, m.main_id ASC
ORDER BY d.name ASC, m.main_id ASC
ORDER BY m.answertime_bachelor ASC, m.main_id ASC
ORDER BY m.num ASC, m.main_id ASC
ORDER BY m.realdifficulty ASC, m.main_id ASC
ORDER BY m.distinction ASC, m.main_id ASC
ORDER BY m.distinction ASC, m.main_id ASC
ORDER BY t.real_name ASC, m.main_id ASC
ORDER BY v.real_name ASC, m.main_id ASC
ORDER BY t1.name ASC, t2.name ASC, t3.name ASC, m.main_id ASC
ORDER BY m.creatorname ASC, m.main_id ASC
ORDER BY m.addtime ASC, m.main_id ASC
ORDER BY m.addtime ASC, m.main_id ASC
mapper.select: select q.updatetime as updatetime, q.id as qid, q.ismain as ismain, q.qtiscon as iscon, q.cid as cid from QUESTION_DB q where q.state=2 and q.updatetime is not null and q.updatetime < (to_date(#{updatetime},'yyyy-mm-dd')-30)

select q.id as qid, q.qtiscon as qtiscon, q.mqid as mqid, q.state as state, q.content as content, q.answertime as answertime, q.answerid as answerid, q.answerexplain as exp, q.distinction as distinction, q.standard_deviation as standardDeviation, q.realdifficulty as realdifficulty, q.num as num, q.filepath as filepath from question_db q where q.mqid = #{mqid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and q.state != 2 order by to_number(q.id)
select a.id as aid, a.content as content, a.atid as atid, a.aorder as aorder, a.content_6 as content_6 from answer_db a where a.qid = #{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by a.id

select q.id as qid, q.cid as cid, q.mqid as mqid, q.ismain as ismain, q.qtiscon as iscon, q.state as state, q.addtime as addtime, q.answerid as answerid, q.answerexplain as exp, q.answertime as answertime, q.distinction as distinction, q.standard_deviation as standardDeviation, q.realdifficulty as realdifficulty, q.num as num, q.content as content, q.filepath as filepath, qt.qtid as qtid, qt.qtname as qtname, qt.xxdf as xxdf, s.id as soid, s.name as soname, q.arrangeid as aid, q.cognitionid as coid, q. difficultyid as did, q.knowledgeid as kid, q.atid as atid, q.answertime_bachelor as answertime_b, t1.id as t1id, t1.name as t1name, t2.id as t2id, t2.name as t2name, t3.id as t3id, t3.name as t3name from question_db q left join theme t1 on q.theme1id = t1.id left join theme t2 on q.theme2id = t2.id left join theme t3 on q.theme3id = t3.id
left join course_questiontype qt on q.qtid=qt.qtid and q.cid=qt.cid and qt.state=0 left join source s on q.sourceid = s.id where q.id =#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select q.id as qid, q.mqid as mqid, q.ismain as ismain, q.answerid as answerid, q.answerexplain as exp, q.answertime as answertime, q.distinction as distinction, q.standard_deviation as standardDeviation, q.realdifficulty as realdifficulty, q.num as num, q.content as content, q.arrangeid as aid, q.cognitionid as cid, q.difficultyid as did, q.knowledgeid as kid, q.filepath as filepath, q.atid as atid, qt.qtname as qtname, qt.xxdf as xxdf, s.name as soname, t1.name as t1name, t2.name as t2name, t3.name as t3name, ct.real_name as creator, q.creatorname as creatorname, TO_CHAR(q.addtime, 'yy-mm-dd hh24:mi') as createtime, vt.real_name as verify, q.verifyname as verifyname, TO_CHAR(q.time4verify, 'yy-mm-dd hh24:mi') as verifytime, ut.real_name as updator, ut.name as updatorname, TO_CHAR(q.updatetime, 'yy-mm-dd hh24:mi') as updatetime, q.state as state, q.answertime_bachelor as answertime_b from question_db q left join teacher ct on ct.id = q.creatorid left join teacher vt on vt.id = q.verifyid left join teacher ut on ut.id = q.updatorid left join theme t1 on q.theme1id = t1.id left join theme t2 on q.theme2id = t2.id left join theme t3 on q.theme3id = t3.id left join course_questiontype qt on qt.qtid=q.qtid and qt.cid=q.cid left join source s on s.id = q.sourceid where q.id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select ca.aid as aid,ca.aname as aname from course_arrangement ca where ca.aid=#{aid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and ca.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select cc.coid as cid,cc.coname as cname from course_cognition cc where cc.coid=#{coid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and cc.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select cd.did as did,cd.dname as dname from course_difficulty cd where cd.did=#{did,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and cd.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select ck.kid as kid,ck.kname as kname from course_knowledge ck where ck.kid = #{kid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and ck.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select id as answertimeid,name as answertime from SYSTEM_TIME where id = #{answertimeid}
select Q01_SEQ.nextval as key from dual
select A01_SEQ.nextval as key from dual
mapper.delete: delete from answer_db a where a.qid=#{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into ANSWER_DB
id,
content,
qid,
atid,
content_6,
aorder,
score,
#{aid},
#{answer_content},
#{id},
#{answertype},
#{answer_content_6},
#{index},
#{score},
mapper.update:
update answer_db
content = #{answer_content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
atid = #{answertype},
content_6 = #{answer_content_6,jdbcType=CLOB},
score = #{score},
where id=#{aid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into QUESTION_DB
id,
cid,
mqid,
qtiscon,
ismain,
answerexplain,
answerid,
addtime,
difficultyid,
knowledgeid,
qtid,
atid,
arrangeid,
sourceid,
cognitionid,
theme1id,
theme2id,
theme3id,
creatorid,creatorname,
answertime,
realdifficulty,
num,
distinction,
count,
cognitionid_bachelor,
difficultyid_bachelor,
knowledgeid_bachelor,
answertime_bachelor,
filepath,
standard_deviation,
score,
content,
#{id},
#{cid},
#{mqid},
#{iscon},
#{isMain},
#{answerexplain},
#{answerid},
#{addtime},
#{difficultyid},
#{knowledgeid},
#{qtid},
#{atid},
#{aid},
#{sourceid},
#{cognitionid},
#{theme1id},
#{theme2id},
#{theme3id},
#{creatorid},(select t.real_name from teacher t where t.id=#{creatorid}),
#{answertime},
#{realdifficulty},
#{num},
#{distinction},
#{count},
#{cognitionid_b},
#{difficultyid_b},
#{knowledgeid_b},
#{answertime_b},
#{filepath},
#{standardDeviation},
#{score},
#{content},
mapper.update: update course_ques_page_total set question_total=question_total+1 where cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: delete from question_db qv where qv.id=#{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select q.id as qid, q.qtiscon as qtiscon, q.content as content, q.mqid as mqid, q.answertime_bachelor as sttime, q.answerid as answerid, q.answertime_bachelor as answertime, q.answerexplain as answerexplain, q.distinction as distinction, q.filepath as filepath, q.standard_deviation as standardDeviation, q.realdifficulty as realdifficulty, q.creatorid as creatorid, ut.real_name as updatorname, ut.name as updator, vt.name as verifyname, t.name as creatorname, vt.real_name as verifyrealname, t.real_name as creator, q.creatorname as qcreatorname, q.verifyname as qverifyname, q.num as num, q.count as qcount, cc.name as coname, cd.name as dname, ck.name as kname, cs.name as soname, qt.qtname as qtname, qt.atid as atid, t1.name as t1name, t2.name as t2name, t3.name as t3name from question_db q left join teacher t on q.creatorid=t.id left join teacher vt on q.verifyid = vt.id left join teacher ut on q.updatorid = ut.id left join theme t1 on q.theme1id = t1.id left join theme t2 on q.theme2id = t2.id left join theme t3 on q.theme3id = t3.id left join cognition cc on q.cognitionid_bachelor = cc.id left join difficulty cd on q.difficultyid_bachelor = cd.id left join knowledge ck on q.knowledgeid_bachelor = ck.id left join source cs on q.sourceid = cs.id left join course_questiontype qt on qt.qtid=q.qtid and qt.cid=q.cid where q.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and q.mqid = #{mqid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by to_number(q.id)
select t.id from cognition t where t.name = #{coname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select t.id from source t where t.name = #{soname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select t.id from knowledge t where t.name = #{kname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select t.id from difficulty t where t.name = #{dname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into ANSWER_DB(ID, CONTENT, QID, ATID,CONTENT_6,AORDER)
select #{item.aid}, #{item.answer_content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{id}, #{answertype},#{item.answer_content_6,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{index} from dual
mapper.update: update question_db q set q.mqid=#{mqid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where q.id=#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select count(*) as num, theme1id as thid, qtid as qtid from question_db q where q.ismain = 0 and q.cid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and q.state !=2
and (floor(sysdate - to_date(q.testtime)) >= #{forbidDay} or q.testtime is null)
and (q.num < #{forbidNum} or q.num is null)
and q.state = #{isVerified}
group by q.theme1id, q.qtid

select * from (select qt.qtid as qtid, qt.qtname as qtname, qt.iscon, qt.atid as atid,nvl(res.qcount,0) as qcount,qt.qtorder from course_questiontype qt left join (select q.qtid,count(*) as qcount from question_db q where q.ismain = 0 and q.state!=2
and (floor(sysdate - to_date(q.testtime)) >= #{forbidDay} or q.testtime is null)
and (q.num < #{forbidNum} or q.num is null)
and q.state = #{isVerified}
and q.cid =#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by q.qtid) res on qt.qtid=res.qtid where qt.cid= #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) where qcount >0 order by qtorder
select count(q.id) as num from question_db q where q.ismain = 0 and q.state!=2 and q.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select count(q.id) as num, min(q.difficultyid_bachelor) as did, min(d.name) as dname from QUESTION_DB q left join difficulty d on q.difficultyid_bachelor=d.id where q.cid = #{c_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and q.ismain = 0 and q.state !=2 group by q.difficultyid_bachelor,d.name order by min(q.difficultyid_bachelor)

select count(q.id) as num, min(q.cognitionid_bachelor) as coid, min(c.name) as coname from QUESTION_DB q left join cognition c on q.cognitionid_bachelor=c.id where q.cid = #{c_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and q.ismain = 0 and q.state !=2 group by q.cognitionid_bachelor,c.name order by min(q.cognitionid_bachelor)

select count(q.id) as num, min(q.knowledgeid_bachelor) as kid, min(k.name) as kname from QUESTION_DB q left join knowledge k on q.knowledgeid_bachelor=k.id where q.cid = #{c_id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and q.ismain = 0 and q.state !=2 group by q.knowledgeid_bachelor ,k.name order by min(q.knowledgeid_bachelor)

select distinct qtname as qtname from ( select qt.qtname, qtorder from course_questiontype qt, (select distinct qtid from question_db q where q.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} ) t where qt.qtid = t.qtid and qt.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by qtorder) where qtname is not null

WITH base_q AS ( SELECT q.id, q.cid, q.qtid, q.state, q.creatorname, q.updatorname, q.updatorid, q.verifyname, q.lastverifyname, q.addtime, q.updatetime, q.time4verify, qt.qtname FROM question_db q INNER JOIN course_questiontype qt ON qt.qtid = q.qtid AND qt.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE q.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} AND q.ismain = 0 AND q.state != 2 ) SELECT WORKTYPE, NAME, QTNAME, QCOUNT FROM ( SELECT 'createWork' AS WORKTYPE, NVL(creatorname, 'noResult') AS NAME, qtname AS QTNAME, COUNT(id) AS QCOUNT FROM base_q WHERE 1 = 1
AND addtime >= TO_DATE(#{beginDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AND addtime < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1
GROUP BY qtname, creatorname
UNION ALL
SELECT 'updateWork' AS WORKTYPE, NVL(updatorname, 'noResult') AS NAME, qtname AS QTNAME, COUNT(id) AS QCOUNT FROM base_q WHERE updatorid IS NOT NULL
AND updatetime >= TO_DATE(#{beginDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AND updatetime < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1
GROUP BY qtname, updatorname
UNION ALL
SELECT 'verifyWork' AS WORKTYPE, NVL(verifyname, 'noResult') AS NAME, qtname AS QTNAME, COUNT(id) AS QCOUNT FROM base_q WHERE state = 1
AND time4verify >= TO_DATE(#{beginDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AND time4verify < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1
GROUP BY qtname, verifyname
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lastVerifyWork' AS WORKTYPE, NVL(lastverifyname, 'noResult') AS NAME, qtname AS QTNAME, COUNT(id) AS QCOUNT FROM base_q WHERE state = 3
AND time4verify >= TO_DATE(#{beginDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AND time4verify < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1
GROUP BY qtname, lastverifyname
UNION ALL
SELECT 'create_updateWork' AS WORKTYPE, n'noResult' AS NAME, NULL AS QTNAME, COUNT(id) AS QCOUNT FROM base_q WHERE 1=1
AND ( (addtime >= TO_DATE(#{beginDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AND addtime < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1) OR (updatorid IS NOT NULL AND updatetime >= TO_DATE(#{beginDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AND updatetime < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'yyyy-mm-dd') + 1) )
) ORDER BY NLSSORT(NAME, 'NLS_SORT=SCHINESE_PINYIN_M')
select q.id,q.ismain,q.qtiscon as iscon from question_db q where q.cid = #{cid} and q.state !=2

select ad.id as aid, ad.qid, ad.atid, ad.content as acontent, ad.content_6 from answer_db ad inner join question_db q on q.id = ad.qid and q.atid = ad.atid where q.cid = #{cid} and q.state !=2
AND ad.atid in (n'0',n'1',n'2',n'3',n'8',n'9')
select a.id as aid, a.content as acontent, a.atid as atid, a.content_6 as content_6 from answer_db a where a.qid = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by a.id
select cid from question_db where id=#{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update question_db q set q.num = q.num + 1, q.testtime = to_date(#{testtime},'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), q.real_num = q.real_num + 1 where exists (select 1 from exampaper_question_db eq where q.id =eq.qid and eq.eid = #{eid,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select * from theme th where th.name = #{th_name} and th.cid = #{th_cid} and th.tlevel = #{th_level} and th.state = 1
SELECT TH01_SEQ.currval as id FROM DUAL
mapper.update: update theme t set t.state = 1 where t.id=#{id}
mapper.insert:
select th01_seq.currval from dual
insert into theme (name,pid,tlevel,cid) values (#{th_name}, #{th_pid}, #{th_level}, #{th_cid})
mapper.select: select qt.qtid as id, qt.qtname as name from course_questiontype qt where qt.qtid in (select q.qtid from question_db q where q.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by q.qtid) and qt.cid=#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select t1.id as id, t1.name as name, t1.tlevel as tlevel from theme t1 where t1.id in (select q.theme1id from question_db q where q.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by q.theme1id) and t1.state='1' order by t1.torder
select co.id as id, co.name as name from cognition co where co.id in (select q.cognitionid_bachelor from question_db q where q.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by q.cognitionid_bachelor)
select d.id as id, d.name as name from difficulty d where d.id in (select q.difficultyid_bachelor from question_db q where q.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by q.difficultyid_bachelor)
select k.id as id, k.name as name from knowledge k where k.id in (select q.knowledgeid_bachelor from question_db q where q.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by q.knowledgeid_bachelor)
select q.content from question_db q where q.mqid = #{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

WITH ids AS (
SELECT TO_NCHAR(REGEXP_SUBSTR(#{item,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL)) AS cid FROM dual CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LENGTH(#{item,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}) - LENGTH(REPLACE(#{item,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ',', '')) + 1
), cid_list AS ( SELECT DISTINCT cid FROM ids ) SELECT NVL(
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question_db q JOIN cid_list i ON i.cid = q.cid WHERE q.ismain = 0 AND q.state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER} )
(SELECT NVL(SUM(q.question_total), 0) FROM course_ques_page_total q JOIN cid_list i ON i.cid = q.cid)
,0) AS tar FROM dual
mapper.insert:
insert into theme (id,name,pid,tlevel,cid,torder)
select #{item.id}, #{item.th_name}, #{item.th_pid}, #{item.th_level}, #{item.th_cid}, #{item.id} from dual
mapper.select: select q.id as qid from question_db q where dbms_lob.compare(q.content,to_clob(#{content})) = 0 and q.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and q.qtid = #{qtid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select.foreach: select 1 from answer_db a where a.qid = #{qid} and a.content = #{item}

mapper.select: select edittimes from question_db where id = #{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select t.id from theme t where t.name = #{th_lastName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t.tlevel = #{th_lastLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER} and t.cid = #{th_cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and rownum = 1
select q.id,q.cid,q.answertime from question_time q where q.flag=0 and q.cid=#{cid}
mapper.update: update question_time set answertime=#{ANSWERTIME},flag=1 where id=#{ID}
update exampaper_time set answertime=#{ANSWERTIME},flag=1 where qid=#{QID} and eid=#{EID}
mapper.select: select id from question_db where id = #{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and rownum = 1

select q.id as qid, q.cid, q.mqid as mqid, q.ismain as ismain, q.qtiscon as iscon, q.answerid as answerid, q.answerexplain as answerexplain, q.answertime as answertime, q.distinction as distinction, q.standard_deviation as standardDeviation, q.realdifficulty as realdifficulty, q.content as content, q.filepath as filepath, q.atid as atid, q.qtid as qtid, q.arrangeid, q.sourceid, q.cognitionid, q.difficultyid, q.knowledgeid, q.cognitionid_bachelor as cognitionid_b, q.difficultyid_bachelor as difficultyid_b , q.knowledgeid_bachelor as knowledgeid_b, q.answertime_bachelor as answertime_b, q.theme1id, q.theme2id, q.theme3id, q.state as state from question_db q where q.id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select q.id as qid, q.answerid as answerid, q.cid as cid, q.qtiscon as qtiscon, q.mqid as mqid, q.ismain as ismain, q.content as content, q.qtid, q.filepath from question_db q where q.mqid = #{mqid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by to_number(q.id)
mapper.update: update question_db set num = 0 where id = #{qid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select * from question_db where state=#{state,jdbcType=INTEGER} and id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select cq.question_total from course_ques_page_total cq where cq.cid = #{cid,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}
